page_metadata.biotools__summary: A browser-based tool for the exploration and visualization of RNA-seq data. BEAVR is a graphical tool to automate analysis and exploration of small and large RNAseq datasets using DESeq2.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A browser-based tool for the exploration and visualization of RNA-seq data. BEAVR is a graphical tool to automate analysis and exploration of small and large RNAseq datasets using DESeq2.
